prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约15647名→14388名→13433名→13358名→17875名。2021至2024年呈逐年小幅前移趋势（累计前移约2289名），但2025年因云南 省首次实施新高考（物理类）且招生计划大幅扩招，位次骤然后移至17875名，较2024年后移约4517名，形成明显的结构性波动；该校在云南省该科类招生计划 ：2021年53人、2022年63人、2023年63人、2024年90人、2025年138人，呈持续扩招态势。2026年计划168人，较2025年再增30人（扩幅约21.7%），连续扩招对位次产生显 著后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第113名→2023年第107名→2025年第103名→2026年第97名，首 次进入全国前100，学校综合实力和声誉稳步提升；2022年高考周期内曾因学校管理争议出现偏负面声誉信号，但2026年声誉文件中无该校重大负面舆情记录；抖音综合热度排名第63位（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；历史无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中化学工程 与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；该校以工科为主，机械、材料、电气等传统工科实力较强，与招生专业中的计算机类、电气工程、机械设计制造等热门方向形成支撑。 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，对工科院校报考有正向拉动；化学工程与工艺（A-）属生化环材大类， 社会舆论偏劝退，但作为该校王牌学科仍具一定吸引力；云南省2026年普通高考总人数约37.79万人，按近年物理类占比约57.5%估算，物理类考生约21.73万人，较2025年17.33万 人增加约25.4%，考生规模显著扩大加剧了竞争。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，距云南省较远，非西南考生热门地域选择，跨省报考存在一定地域偏好阻力；该校在云南省招生计划占比较小，属省外招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026年招生计划继续扩招约21.7%的供需压力、云南省物理类考生规模 显著扩大约25.4%带来的竞争加剧，以及学校排名稳步提升（首次进入前100）的正面吸引力，考虑考生规模扩大和地域偏远的叠加影响，小幅 上调修正。预测2026年最低位次约20257名，区间19757–20757名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间19757–20757名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如19757名以内）可重点冲刺一档的计算机科学与技术 （试验班）和电气工程及其自动化；位次在区间中段（约20000–20500名）应以二档的电子信息类、机械类、能源动力类为核心选择；位次接近区间上限（约20757名）建议以三档 专业保底，同时关注化学工程与工艺（A-学科）等特色专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 15647, 14388, 13433, 13358, and 17875 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a gradual upward trend (cumulative increase of about 2289 places), but in 2025, due to Yunnan Province's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (Physics Category) and a significant expansion of enrollment plans, the ranking suddenly dropped to 17875, a decrease of about 4517 places compared to 2024, forming an obvious structural fluctuation. The university's enrollment plans in Yunnan for this subject category were: 53 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 90 in 2024, and 138 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 168, an increase of 30 (about 21.7%) compared to 2025, and the continuous expansion puts significant downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years: 113th in 2021, 107th in 2023, 103rd in 2025, and 97th in 2026, entering the national top 100 for the first time, indicating steady improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, there were some negative reputation signals due to school management controversies, but in the 2026 reputation documents, there are no records of major negative public opinion about the university. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 63rd (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. There is no history of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. The university is primarily engineering-oriented, with strong traditional engineering fields such as mechanics, materials, and electrical engineering, supporting popular majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Mechanical Design and Manufacturing. Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly popular in society, positively driving applications to engineering universities. Chemical Engineering and Technology (A-), though part of the biology, chemistry, environment, and materials category which is often discouraged by public opinion, still has some appeal as the university's flagship discipline. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination participants in Yunnan Province is about 377,900. Estimating based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 57.5%, there are about 217,300 Physics Category examinees, an increase of about 25.4% compared to 173,300 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan City, Shanxi Province, which is far from Yunnan Province and not a popular regional choice for southwestern examinees. Cross-province applications face some regional preference resistance. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Province is relatively small, making it an out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the supply-demand pressure from the continued expansion of enrollment plans in 2026 (about 21.7%), the intensified competition due to the significant increase in the number of Physics Category examinees in Yunnan Province (about 25.4%), and the positive attraction of the university's steadily improving ranking (entering the top 100 for the first time), with the combined effects of the increase in examinee numbers and the remote location, a slight upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 20257, with a range of 19757 to 20757.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19757 to 20757, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 19757), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology (Experimental Class) and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (about 20000 to 20500), you should prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information, Mechanical, and Energy and Power categories. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (about 20757), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to distinctive majors like Chemical Engineering and Technology (A- discipline).
